hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const now=new Date().toISOString();const file=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT||'';if(!file||!file.includes('output/'))process.exit(0);if(!fs.existsSync('output'))fs.mkdirSync('output',{recursive:true});let content=fs.existsSync('output/progress.md')?fs.readFileSync('output/progress.md','utf8'):'# 진행 현황

';content+='- '+now+' | '+file+'
';fs.writeFileSync('output/progress.md',content);"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const now=new Date().toISOString();const file=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT||'';const tracked=['templates/','agents/','docs/','.claude/skills/','.claude/scripts/'];const match=tracked.some(p=>file.includes(p));if(!match)process.exit(0);const dir='.claude';if(!fs.existsSync(dir))fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});const log=dir+'/progress-infra.md';let content=fs.existsSync(log)?fs.readFileSync(log,'utf8'):'# 인프라 변경 이력

';content+='- '+now+' | '+file+'
';fs.writeFileSync(log,content);"
